allow: Bash(edge-tts --voice=en-US-GuyNeural --rate=+5% --text="Agents will pay other agents for research, data, code, and API-backed work. But when a seller says done, the buyer only sees the result, not the execution." --write-media="public/voiceover/scene-01.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice=en-US-GuyNeural --rate=+5% --text="Did it call the promised model? Did it use the right API? Or did it replace the work with a cheaper shortcut?" --write-media="public/voiceover/scene-02.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice=en-US-GuyNeural --rate=+5% --text="TyrPay turns agent payments into verifiable settlement. Funds can move only through commitment, proof, and verification enforced by contracts on 0G Chain." --write-media="public/voiceover/scene-03.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice=en-US-GuyNeural --rate=+5% --text="Before funds move, the seller commits to the model, endpoint, usage, deadline, and proof mode. The commitment hash is recorded by the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain." --write-media="public/voiceover/scene-04.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice=en-US-GuyNeural --rate=+5% --text="The buyer accepts the commitment and locks funds into the TyrPay contract on 0G Chain. The seller has not been paid yet." --write-media="public/voiceover/scene-05.mp3")
